description: The canonical Capture-side type for Step 3 dispatching is DispatchSaveRequest (workflows.ts lines 61-65), which bridges Capture (TypeScript) to Vault (Rust) and returns Promise<Result<NoteFileSaved, NoteSaveFailed>>. The spec does not reference DispatchSaveRequest anywhere. REQ-007 describes Step 3 as if the pipeline directly calls FileSystem.writeFileAtomic, and the verification architecture lists FileSystemWriteFileAtomic as a port — but this port is on the Vault (Rust) side, not in CaptureDeps.
